channel.title: GlobalSentry Supply Chain Threat Feed
channel.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Houthi missile strikes disable 3 container ships in Red Sea — global shipping reroutes via Cape of Good Hope
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Panama Canal reduces daily transits to 22 from 36 due to severe drought — 6-week vessel queue forms
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Port of Shanghai shuts down for 72 hours as Typhoon Lekima approaches — 850 vessels stranded
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Suez Canal blockage: grounded bulk carrier halts traffic for 4 days — $9.6B/day in trade stalled
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Baltimore port closure after bridge collapse disrupts East Coast auto and coal exports for months
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: TSMC halts production at Fab 18 after 6.4 magnitude earthquake near Hualien, Taiwan
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: US-China chip war escalates: Beijing bans gallium and germanium exports — prices surge 400%
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Samsung's Austin fab contamination incident destroys 3 months of advanced chip output
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Global automotive chip shortage returns as ASML delays EUV lithography machine deliveries
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Intel postpones Ohio fab construction citing $28 billion cost overrun and demand uncertainty
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: European natural gas prices spike 180% as Norway's Troll field enters emergency maintenance
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Russia cuts remaining gas flows through TurkStream pipeline amid new EU sanctions package
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Global LNG tanker shortage strands Asian buyers — spot prices hit $45/MMBtu
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Saudi Arabia extends OPEC+ production cuts through Q3 2026 — Brent crude crosses $105/barrel
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Lithium carbonate prices collapse 60% — Chilean and Australian miners halt expansion plans
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: India bans rice exports as monsoon failure threatens 40% crop shortfall
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Ukraine grain corridor suspended after Russian withdrawal — wheat futures surge to $9.50/bushel
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Brazilian coffee crop devastated by worst frost in 50 years — arabica prices hit 10-year high
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Fertilizer shortage in sub-Saharan Africa: 30 million hectares go unplanted this season
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Bird flu outbreak forces culling of 90 million poultry in US — egg prices triple
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Toyota suspends 14 assembly lines across Japan after cyberattack on key supplier Kojima Industries
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Volkswagen warns of 6-week production halt as magnesium shortage from China worsens
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Tesla Gigafactory Berlin halted by arson attack on nearby power infrastructure
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Global auto production forecast cut by 4 million units as wiring harness supply from Ukraine collapses
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Ford recalls 500,000 EVs over battery defect linked to single CATL cell manufacturing line
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: FDA reports critical shortage of IV saline and contrast dye after Baxter plant flood damage
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: China's API export restrictions cause global antibiotic shortage — penicillin stocks at 2-week supply
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Novo Nordisk rations Ozempic globally as GLP-1 demand outstrips production 3:1
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: WHO warns of heparin shortage as global pig farming disrupted by African Swine Fever
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Indian generic drug exports halted at 12 plants after surprise FDA quality inspections
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: China restricts rare earth processing tech exports — wind turbine manufacturers scramble for alternatives
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Cobalt supply crisis deepens as DRC suspends mining permits in Katanga province
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Indonesia's nickel export ban disrupts stainless steel supply chains across Asia
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Myanmar's rare earth mining shutdown cuts global heavy rare earth supply by 30%
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Critical graphite shortage threatens EV battery production — prices up 85% year-over-year
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Ransomware attack on Maersk subsidiary disrupts container tracking across 76 port terminals worldwide
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: MOVEit-style vulnerability exploited across 3 major freight forwarders — shipping documents compromised
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Colonial Pipeline-scale attack hits European fuel distribution network — 5 countries affected
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: JBS-style cyberattack shuts down Brazil's 3 largest meatpacking plants for 10 days
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Port of Rotterdam's terminal operating system breached — automated cranes halted for 48 hours
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: US West Coast dockworkers begin indefinite strike — $1.9B/day in cargo stranded at ports
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: South Korea's trucking strike paralyzes petrochemical and steel distribution for 2nd week
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Taiwan Strait tensions: insurers withdraw war-risk coverage for vessels transiting strait
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Red Sea crisis forces 92% of container traffic to reroute — transit times increase 14 days
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Ethiopian civil conflict disrupts East Africa's primary logistics corridor via Djibouti port
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: FedEx and UPS warn of 15% capacity shortfall ahead of peak season due to pilot shortages
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Amazon warehouse workers strike across 7 European countries during Prime Day
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Global container shipping rates hit $8,200/FEU on Asia-Europe route — 4x pre-crisis levels
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Air cargo capacity crunch: belly hold space vanishes as airlines cut long-haul frequencies
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.

item.title: Rail freight bottleneck at US-Mexico border as new customs screening rules take effect
item.description: Real-time intelligence on global supply chain disruptions, logistics failures, and trade risks.
